summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 20 features: Stories CRUD, Banner CRUD, AI Image Generation (Nano Banana), AI Video Generation (Sora 2), Chatbot Analytics, and Storefront Stories Widget. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with all new tabs and components.

issues: Hero title shows numeric ID '1776972075.4973445' instead of proper store name - appears to be test/seed data issue (noted in previous iteration)

seed_data_creation: Test stories and banner data created during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) Stories CRUD - create/read/update/delete stories via /api/websites/client/stories endpoints, (2) Banner CRUD - get/update banner config via /api/websites/client/banner, (3) Public stories endpoint - /api/websites/public/{slug}/stories returns stories, banner, store_name with hidden stories filtered, (4) AI Image Generation - POST /api/websites/client/media/generate-image uses Nano Banana, creates story with ai_generated=true, (5) AI Video Generation - POST /api/websites/client/media/generate-video creates async job, GET /api/websites/client/media/jobs/{id} tracks status, (6) Chatbot Analytics - GET /api/websites/client/chatbot/analytics returns totals (messages, handoffs, handoff_rate_pct, unique_sessions), topics with counts, lost_questions, recent messages, (7) Frontend StoriesTab - has sub-tabs for stories and banner, AI image prompt (data-testid='story-image-prompt'), AI video prompt (story-video-prompt), upload button (story-upload-btn), (8) Frontend ChatbotTab Analytics - has sub-tab 'تحليلات المحادثات', shows 4 KPI cards (kpi-messages, kpi-sessions, kpi-handoffs, kpi-handoff-rate), topic bars, lost questions list, (9) Storefront Stories Widget - banner (.zxsb-banner) and stories ribbon (.zxsb-stories) render in iframe, story viewer (.zxsb-viewer) opens on click with progress bar (.zxsb-viewer-pfill), close button works.

features_verified.hidden_stories_filtered: ✅ Stories with visible:false are filtered from public endpoint
features_verified.ai_image_generation: ✅ POST /api/websites/client/media/generate-image (Nano Banana) generates image and creates story
features_verified.ai_video_generation: ✅ POST /api/websites/client/media/generate-video (Sora 2) creates async job with status tracking
features_verified.chatbot_analytics: ✅ GET /api/websites/client/chatbot/analytics returns totals, topics, lost_questions, recent
features_verified.frontend_stories_tab: ✅ StoriesTab with sub-tabs, AI prompts, upload button all visible
features_verified.frontend_chatbot_analytics: ✅ Analytics sub-tab with 4 KPI cards, topic bars, lost questions visible
features_verified.storefront_banner: ✅ .zxsb-banner element renders with Ken Burns animation
features_verified.storefront_story_viewer: ✅ .zxsb-viewer opens on click, progress bar advances, close button works

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Claude Sonnet for chatbot, Nano Banana for image gen, Sora 2 for video gen via Emergent Universal Key)
